prompt: Start with @m and coordinate this tiny feature workflow without waiting. CRITICAL: You MUST launch @a, @t, and @cr as real subagent handoffs using the handoff mechanism — not just mentions in text. The benchmark validates actual SubagentStart hooks. Use @a for the implementation sketch, add a weighted-average helper in calculator.py using sum(value * weight) / sum(weights), use @t for verification planning and pytest coverage, use @cr for review, update README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, architect, tester, and reviewer roles
The weighted-average helper is implemented with tests
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
